## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai) and Andy Haley regarding a potential Managing Director role at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is rapidly scaling (40+ employees, 4 clients, 60 in pipeline) with a unique AI-powered service delivery model](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [The role requires balancing efficiency and effectiveness while maintaining the company's "magic" and entrepreneurial spirit](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Andy's experience at Razorfish and his leadership style align well with growthx.ai's needs and culture](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Next steps include reference checks and a potential offer from Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Current State and Vision

  - [Rapid growth: 40+ employees, 4 clients, 60 in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Raised funding at software multiples ($4M+ in bank)](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Building AI-powered workflow engine and runtime layer](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Attracting top talent (e.g., principal engineer from Airbnb)](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [High investor interest (A16Z, Bessemer)](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Role Expectations and Success Metrics

  - [Balance efficiency and effectiveness without losing "magic"](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Act as extension of Marcel (former CMO/buyer)](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Build strong client relationships (fractional CMO/advisor)](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Coach client-facing teams](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Drive outcomes with agency and ownership](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Company Culture and Values

  - [Guiding principles: communicate with clarity, relentless excellence, never stop learning, move fast but stay steady, lead with empathy](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Emphasis on agency and ownership of outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Balance of vision and execution](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Healthy mix of ambition and heads-down problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)

### Andy's Leadership Style and Experience

  - [Strong problem-solver and idea generator](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Effective client relationship builder](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Empathetic leader who prioritizes team growth](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Self-sufficient account manager (largest/second-largest at Razorfish)](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Emphasis on team training and standardizing processes](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Potential Areas for Improvement (based on Andy's insights)

  - [Enhance team training programs](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Strengthen business development pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Standardize processes across accounts while maintaining creativity](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Improve case studies and storytelling across all accounts](https://fathom.video/share/5sA8aX4zyLr4HozBQmEUG3kjuwysadk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marcel to conduct reference checks for Andy
  - Prepare and extend offer to Andy
  - Schedule additional discussions if needed (with Andy or other team members)
  - Andy to review offer and follow up with any questions or concerns
